name: waside
license: (Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception) OR Apache-2.0 OR MIT
description: An AST for WebAssembly that supports decoding, encoding, and printing.

scripts.build: npm run build-component && npm run transpile
scripts.clean: rm -rf ../crates/waside-component/src/bindings.rs dist && echo '## you will need to run `cargo clean` separately to delete cargo artifacts'
